mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT user_role.user_id FROM sys_user_role user_role JOIN sys_role_menu role_menu ON user_role.role_id = role_menu.role_id AND role_menu.del_flag = 0 JOIN sys_menu menu ON role_menu.menu_id = menu.menu_id AND menu.del_flag = 0 WHERE user_role.del_flag = 0 AND menu.menu_code = #{menuCode}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user_role user_role JOIN sys_role_menu role_menu ON user_role.role_id = role_menu.role_id AND role_menu.del_flag = 0 JOIN sys_menu menu ON role_menu.menu_id = menu.menu_id AND menu.del_flag = 0 WHERE user_role.del_flag = 0 AND user_role.user_id = #{userId} AND menu.menu_code = #{menuCode}
